description: Deep Memory capture hooks for Claude Code (fail-open env-bootstrap, non-blocking).

hooks.command: node -e "const r=process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT||process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT||'';if(r===''){console.error('deep-memory session-start hook: plugin root env unset; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}try{require(require('node:path').join(r,'scripts','hook-bootstrap.cjs')).run('session-start')}catch(e){console.error('deep-memory session-start hook: bootstrap unavailable; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}"

node -e "const r=process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT||process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT||'';if(r===''){console.error('deep-memory user-prompt-submit hook: plugin root env unset; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}try{require(require('node:path').join(r,'scripts','hook-bootstrap.cjs')).run('user-prompt-submit')}catch(e){console.error('deep-memory user-prompt-submit hook: bootstrap unavailable; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}"

node -e "const r=process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT||process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT||'';if(r===''){console.error('deep-memory post-tool-use hook: plugin root env unset; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}try{require(require('node:path').join(r,'scripts','hook-bootstrap.cjs')).run('post-tool-use')}catch(e){console.error('deep-memory post-tool-use hook: bootstrap unavailable; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}"

node -e "const r=process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT||process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT||'';if(r===''){console.error('deep-memory post-tool-failure hook: plugin root env unset; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}try{require(require('node:path').join(r,'scripts','hook-bootstrap.cjs')).run('post-tool-failure')}catch(e){console.error('deep-memory post-tool-failure hook: bootstrap unavailable; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}"

node -e "const r=process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT||process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT||'';if(r===''){console.error('deep-memory pre-compact hook: plugin root env unset; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}try{require(require('node:path').join(r,'scripts','hook-bootstrap.cjs')).run('pre-compact')}catch(e){console.error('deep-memory pre-compact hook: bootstrap unavailable; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}"

node -e "const r=process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT||process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT||'';if(r===''){console.error('deep-memory session-end hook: plugin root env unset; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}try{require(require('node:path').join(r,'scripts','hook-bootstrap.cjs')).run('session-end')}catch(e){console.error('deep-memory session-end hook: bootstrap unavailable; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}"
